html:
Exclusive to:

The Dorsal Fin is an Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is dropped by killed Bottlenose Ballphins and can be used to craft Ballphin Palaces. Unlike Shark Fins, Dorsal Fins are not edible to the player. They can be used as a filler in the Crock Pot, falling under the same category as Twigs.

Trivia

  • Dorsal Fins were added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
  • While some players can mistake this filler item for a meat food, in actuality it is not, as Bunnymen will not attack the player if it has at least one Dorsal Fin in its inventory.
    • This also applies to mobs, as creatures such as Tiger Sharks or Wildbores will not consume Dorsal Fins if they are on the ground.

The Dorsal Fin is an Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is dropped by killed Bottlenose Ballphins and can be used to craft Ballphin Palaces. Unlike Shark Fins, Dorsal Fins are not edible to the player. They can be used as a filler in the Crock Pot, falling under the same category as Twigs.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
Dorsal Fins were added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
While some players can mistake this filler item for a meat food, in actuality it is not, as Bunnymen will not attack the player if it has at least one Dorsal Fin in its inventory.
This also applies to mobs, as creatures such as Tiger Sharks or Wildbores will not consume Dorsal Fins if they are on the ground.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Vây lưng là một Vật phẩm được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó rơi ra từ những con Cá Heo Mũi Chai bị giết và có thể dùng để chế tạo Cung Điện Cá Heo. Không giống như Vây Cá Mập, Người chơi không thể ăn được Vây lưng. Chúng có thể được dùng làm chất bổ sung trong Nồi Hầm , cùng loại với Cành Cây .

They can be used as a filler in the [[Crock Pot]], falling under the same category as [[Twigs]]. =={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage== {{Recipe |item1 = Dorsal Fin |count1 = 2 |item2 = Limestone |count2 = 4 |item3 = Seaweed |count3 = 4 |tool = Science Machine |result = Ballphin Palace}} =={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * Dorsal Fins were added to the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC more than a year after its official completion in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#November 21, 2017 - Home Sea Home Update|Home Sea Home]]'' update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months. *While some players can mistake this filler item for a [[Meats|meat]] food, in actuality it is not, as [[Bunnyman|Bunnymen]] will not attack the player if it has at least one Dorsal Fin in its inventory. **This also applies to mobs, as creatures such as [[Tiger Shark|Tiger Sharks]] or [[Wildbore|Wildbores]] will not consume Dorsal Fins if they are on the ground. {{Mob Dropped Items}} [[vi:Vây Lưng Cá Heo]] [[Category:Shipwrecked]] [[Category:Items]] [[Category:Mob Dropped Items]] [[Category:Resources]] [[Category:Non-Flammable]]
